Billing System

Stripe subscription and usage-based billing

Stripe
Pricing Model

Customer Price = Actual Cost × Plan Multiplier

Free

$0

Multiplier: N/A

• 1 project

• Basic features

• Community support

Pay As You Go

Cost + 20%

Multiplier: 1.2x

• Unlimited projects

• All features

• Email support

Pro

$99/mo

Multiplier: 1.0x

• Unlimited projects

• Priority support

• API access

Agency

$299/mo

Multiplier: 0.9x

• White label

• Client management

• Dedicated support

Enterprise

Custom

Multiplier: 0.8x

• SLA

• Custom features

• Account manager

Tracked Usage

Store Build Fees

One-time per store creation

$25-50

Worker Runtime

VPS compute hours

$0.05/hr

AI API Usage

OpenAI/Anthropic tokens

Pass-through

Research API Usage

Serper/Tavily calls

Pass-through

Meta Ad Spend

Ad budget (handled by Meta)

N/A

Storage

Supabase storage

$0.02/GB
Stripe Integration
// Stripe Webhook Events
interface StripeEvents {
  "checkout.session.completed"
    → Create subscription
    
  "invoice.payment_succeeded"
    → Record payment
    
  "invoice.payment_failed"
    → Alert user, grace period
    
  "customer.subscription.updated"
    → Update plan
    
  "customer.subscription.deleted"
    → Downgrade to free
}

// Usage Records
stripe.subscriptionItems.createUsageRecord(
  subscriptionItemId,
  {
    quantity: workerHours,
    timestamp: now(),
    action: "increment"
  }
)
Billing Tables
// subscriptions table
{
  id: uuid,
  user_id: uuid,
  stripe_customer_id: string,
  stripe_subscription_id: string,
  plan: "free" | "payg" | "pro" | "agency" | "enterprise",
  status: "active" | "canceled" | "past_due",
  current_period_start: timestamp,
  current_period_end: timestamp,
  cancel_at_period_end: boolean
}

// usage_records table
{
  id: uuid,
  project_id: uuid,
  metric_type: "worker_hours" | "ai_tokens" | "storage",
  quantity: decimal,
  recorded_at: timestamp
}

// invoices table (sync from Stripe)
{
  id: uuid,
  user_id: uuid,
  stripe_invoice_id: string,
  amount_due: integer (cents),
  amount_paid: integer (cents),
  status: "draft" | "open" | "paid" | "void",
  pdf_url: string
}
